content.title: Your Dentist Knows About Your Botox Now
content.preview: A new algorithm detects neuromodulator use from jaw imaging. Plus: the fermented black garlic study GI researchers won't shut up about, and Glossier just did something unexpected with their lip gloss.
content.but_first: Radiologists built an AI that can tell from a standard jaw scan whether you've had Botox in your masseters, and the accuracy rate is genuinely unsettling.

quote_of_day.text: Beauty is the only thing that time cannot harm. Philosophies fall away like sand, and creeds follow one another like the withered leaves of autumn; but what is beautiful is a joy for all seasons and a possession for all eternity.
quote_of_day.attribution: — Oscar Wilde, who never had to disclose his injectables to a periodontist

injection_report.headline: An AI Can Now Spot Your Masseter Botox on a Routine Jaw Scan
injection_report.body:
**What's going on:** A preprint posted April 1 from a radiology team at Yonsei University describes a convolutional neural network trained on 4,200 panoramic dental radiographs that identifies masseter neuromodulator use with 91.3% accuracy. The model flags changes in muscle density and mandibular angle morphology that human radiologists miss consistently.

**What it means:** If you've been getting masseter Botox for TMJ or face slimming and checking "no" on the cosmetic procedure line at your dentist's office, that ambiguity is closing fast. Muscle atrophy from repeated neuromodulator use alters bone remodeling patterns, and AI is now better at reading those patterns than your oral surgeon.

**What's next:** Ask your injector how many units you're getting per side and start disclosing it on dental intake forms. Bone density shifts from chronic masseter treatment are clinically relevant for implant planning.
injection_report.highlight: If you get masseter Botox more than twice a year, your dentist needs to know. Bone remodeling changes can affect implant success rates and bite alignment over time.
injection_report.related: The full Yonsei University preprint on CNN detection of neuromodulator-induced masseter atrophy via panoramic radiograph

put_it_in_your_mouth.headline: Fermented Black Garlic Just Got Its First Serious Gut Trial
put_it_in_your_mouth.body:
**What's going on:** A randomized controlled trial published March 31 in *Nutrients* out of Kyung Hee University gave 74 adults with mild functional dyspepsia 600mg of aged black garlic extract daily for 12 weeks. The fermented group showed a 38% reduction in bloating scores and significantly improved gut transit time versus placebo. The active compound, S-allyl-cysteine, appears to modulate gastric motility through serotonin receptor pathways in the gut lining.

**What that means:** This isn't raw garlic, which can torch a sensitive stomach. The fermentation process converts the harsh allicin into gentler sulfur compounds. If you deal with upper GI slowness, this is the first properly controlled evidence that aged black garlic does something beyond taste incredible on sourdough.
put_it_in_your_mouth.highlight: Look for "aged" or "fermented" black garlic extract standardized to S-allyl-cysteine. Raw garlic supplements are a completely different molecule with a completely different side effect profile.
put_it_in_your_mouth.cheat_meal: A bowl of tonkotsu ramen from your favorite spot, extra soft-boiled egg, with a side of pickled black garlic if they have it. The collagen in that broth is not doing what TikTok says it's doing, but the warmth, the fat, and the salt are doing everything your nervous system needs on a Friday.
put_it_in_your_mouth.related: The full Kyung Hee RCT on aged black garlic extract and functional dyspepsia symptom reduction

lip_lab.headline: Glossier Just Quietly Swapped the Plasticizer in Lip Gloss
lip_lab.body:
**What's going on:** Glossier updated its Lip Gloss formula this week with no announcement, swapping trimethylpentanyl succinate for a bio-derived polyglyceryl ester. Ingredient lists on Sephora updated April 2.

**Why it matters:** The old plasticizer gave that famously sticky, glass-finish pull. The new ester is what clean beauty formulators have been pushing for years, but it changes the texture. Less tack, more slip, slightly less shine. It's a regulatory hedge. The EU is tightening restrictions on certain succinate esters, and Glossier clearly wants one global formula.

**The verdict:** If you loved the original stick-to-everything texture, you'll notice. If you hated it, this is your re-entry point. The finish is more hydrating, less lacquered. Color payoff is identical.
lip_lab.highlight: Check the back of your tube. If polyglyceryl-2 isostearate appears in the first eight ingredients, you have the new formula.
lip_lab.related: The EU Scientific Committee on Consumer Safety draft opinion on succinate ester plasticizers in lip products

lips_in_6.text: Galderma filed a supplemental FDA application April 2 for Restylane Contour in the lips, not just midface. If approved, it would be the first HA filler with specific lip-volume labeling based on a cohesive polydensified matrix.

A USDA analysis released April 1 found that 62% of high-end matcha powders sold in the U.S. contain lead levels exceeding California's Prop 65 threshold. Ceremonial grade from Uji and Nishio tested cleanest.

Tower 28 is launching a tinted lip SOS balm on April 7 in six shades. The base is the same hypochlorous acid formula, which means it's one of the only tinted lip products that won't aggravate perioral dermatitis.

A paper in the British Journal of Dermatology published April 3 found that consistent SPF use on the lower face reduced perioral photoaging markers by 47% over five years. The lip vermillion border showed the most dramatic preservation.

The FDA issued a warning letter March 31 to a TikTok-viral brand selling "lip filler dissolving serum" containing undisclosed hyaluronidase. Topical hyaluronidase is not approved OTC. Do not buy anything that claims to dissolve filler without a needle.

Sabrina Carpenter's Short n' Sweet Tour hit Madison Square Garden this week and her makeup artist revealed the lip combo on Instagram: a discontinued YSL vinyl cream stain under a high-shine balm. Resale prices on the stain jumped 200% overnight.

rotation_1.text: We've been using the Supergoop Lipscreen SPF 40 under everything this week. It's the only mineral lip SPF that doesn't leave a white cast or taste like you're licking a beach umbrella. Sits perfectly under gloss or matte lipstick without pilling. The reformulated version (blue cap) is noticeably less waxy.

For anyone dealing with dry, cracked lip corners: the Dr. Dan's CortiBalm is still the only OTC lip balm with 1% hydrocortisone, and it works in about two days flat. We keep one in every bag. Not glamorous. Extremely effective. *Keep scrolling…more recs below*

quick_hits.label: Best Kiss
quick_hits.text: Tower 28 donating 10% of its new tinted lip SOS launch week sales to the National Eczema Association. A brand that built its identity on sensitive skin actually funding sensitive skin research. That's how you do it.

quick_hits.label: Keep It Out
quick_hits.text: Cinnamon bark oil in "plumping" lip products. A contact dermatitis study published this week in Contact Dermatitis found it's the single most common allergen in lip cosmetics, responsible for 23% of reported reactions. Check your ingredient lists.

The American Academy of Dermatology's annual meeting wrapped April 2 in San Francisco. The biggest corridor buzz: combination treatments using microneedling with topical polynucleotides for perioral lines. Formal data expected at EADV in September.

A small pilot out of the University of Milan published April 1 found that 250mg of oral astaxanthin daily for eight weeks increased lip mucosal hydration by 29% measured by corneometry. It's only 22 subjects, but the mechanism, boosting aquaporin-3 expression, tracks with prior skin studies.

on_our_calendar.text: April 7: Tower 28 tinted SOS Lip Balm drops at Sephora. Six shades. Expect sellouts in the two nude shades based on waitlist numbers.
April 8: The Skin of Color Society hosts its free virtual symposium on filler safety in melanin-rich skin. Registration still open.
April 10: Glossier's Friends of Glossier spring sale starts. 20% off sitewide, including the newly reformulated Lip Gloss if you want to test the new formula at a discount.

rotation_2.text: The Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask in vanilla gets all the attention, but the gummy bear flavor they launched for spring is chemically identical with better fragrance engineering. Less synthetic sweetness, more of a soft candy warmth. We've been waking up with genuinely plumper lips.

If you inject and you don't own a Vascular Occlusion Emergency Kit card in your wallet, get one. The Aesthetic Complications Expert Group sells credit-card-sized guides with the exact hyaluronidase protocol. Costs eight dollars. Could save your tissue. *We only feature things we'd actually use on our own face.*

last_word.quote: I think your whole life shows in your face and you should be proud of that.
last_word.attribution: — Lauren Bacall, who never once apologized for a single line on hers
